parameters.query:
SELECT
  o.id,
  'GW-' || upper(left(replace(o.id::text, '-', ''), 8)) AS code,
  CASE
    WHEN o.order_status = 'draft' THEN 'borrador'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'pending_confirmation' THEN 'por_confirmar'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'confirmed' THEN 'confirmado'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'pending_payment' THEN 'pendiente_pago'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'paid_pending_confirmation' THEN 'pagado_por_confirmar'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'in_kitchen' THEN 'preparacion'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'dispatched' THEN 'listo'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'delivered' THEN 'entregado'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'cancelled' THEN 'cancelado'
    ELSE 'por_confirmar'
  END AS status,

  COALESCE(o.confirmed_at, o.requested_at, o.created_at) AS "createdAt",
  COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at) AS "updatedAt",
  COALESCE(o.estimated_minutes_max, o.estimated_minutes_min, 45) AS "etaMin",

  COALESCE(c.full_name, '') AS "customerName",
  COALESCE(c.phone, '') AS phone,
  COALESCE(o.district, '') AS district,
  COALESCE(o.address_text, '') AS address,
  COALESCE(o.reference_text, '') AS reference,

  COALESCE(o.delivery_fee, 0)::float8 AS "deliveryFee",
  COALESCE(o.delivery_type, '') AS "deliveryType",
  COALESCE(o.subtotal, 0)::float8 AS subtotal,

  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(o.total_amount, 0),
    (
      COALESCE(
        (
          SELECT SUM(COALESCE(oi.line_subtotal, 0))
          FROM guaw.order_items oi
          WHERE oi.order_id = o.id
        ),
        0
      )
      +
      COALESCE(o.delivery_fee, 0)
    )
  )::float8 AS total,

  COALESCE(o.customer_notes, o.internal_notes, '') AS notes,

  CASE
    WHEN pr.id IS NOT NULL THEN true
    ELSE false
  END AS "hasReceipt",

  pr.id AS "paymentReceiptId",
  COALESCE(pr.storage_file_name, '') AS "receiptFileName",
  COALESCE(pr.storage_path, '') AS "receiptStoragePath",
  COALESCE(pr.storage_bucket, '') AS "receiptStorageBucket",

  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT json_agg(
        json_build_object(
          'id', oi.id,
          'name', oi.item_name_snapshot,
          'qty', COALESCE(oi.quantity, 0),
          'unitPrice', COALESCE(oi.unit_price, 0)::float8,
          'lineSubtotal', COALESCE(oi.line_subtotal, 0)::float8,
          'notes', oi.notes,
          'extras',
            COALESCE(
              (
                SELECT json_agg(oie.extra_name ORDER BY oie.created_at)
                FROM guaw.order_item_extras oie
                WHERE oie.order_item_id = oi.id
              ),
              '[]'::json
            ),
          'extraItems',
            COALESCE(
              (
                SELECT json_agg(
                  json_build_object(
                    'id', oie.id,
                    'extraName', oie.extra_name,
                    'extraUnitPrice', COALESCE(oie.extra_unit_price, 0)::float8,
                    'subtotal', COALESCE(oie.subtotal, 0)::float8,
                    'quantity', COALESCE(oie.quantity, 1)
                  )
                  ORDER BY oie.created_at
                )
                FROM guaw.order_item_extras oie
                WHERE oie.order_item_id = oi.id
              ),
              '[]'::json
            )
        )
        ORDER BY oi.created_at
      )
      FROM guaw.order_items oi
      WHERE oi.order_id = o.id
    ),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS items

FROM guaw.orders o
LEFT JOIN guaw.customers c
  ON c.id = o.customer_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.storage_file_name,
    r.storage_path,
    r.storage_bucket
  FROM guaw.payment_receipts r
  WHERE r.order_id = o.id
  ORDER BY COALESCE(r.updated_at, r.created_at) DESC
  LIMIT 1
) pr ON true
WHERE o.order_status IN (
  'draft',
  'pending_confirmation',
  'confirmed',
  'pending_payment',
  'paid_pending_confirmation',
  'in_kitchen',
  'dispatched',
  'delivered',
  'cancelled'
)
ORDER BY COALESCE(o.confirmed_at, o.requested_at, o.created_at) DESC
LIMIT 100;

UPDATE guaw.orders
SET
  order_status = '{{ $json.dbStatus }}',
  updated_at = NOW(),
  preparation_started_at = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.dbStatus }}' = 'confirmed' THEN NULL
    WHEN '{{ $json.dbStatus }}' = 'in_kitchen' AND preparation_started_at IS NULL THEN NOW()
    ELSE preparation_started_at
  END,
  ready_at = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.dbStatus }}' IN ('confirmed', 'in_kitchen') THEN NULL
    WHEN '{{ $json.dbStatus }}' = 'dispatched' THEN NOW()
    ELSE ready_at
  END
WHERE id = '{{ $json.orderId }}'
RETURNING
  id,
  order_status,
  address_text,
  district,
  reference_text,
  delivery_fee,
  total_amount,
  estimated_minutes_min,
  estimated_minutes_max,
  customer_notes,
  internal_notes,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  preparation_started_at,
  ready_at;

SELECT
  o.id,
  'GW-' || upper(left(replace(o.id::text, '-', ''), 8)) AS code,
  CASE
    WHEN o.order_status = 'draft' THEN 'borrador'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'pending_confirmation' THEN 'por_confirmar'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'confirmed' THEN 'confirmado'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'pending_payment' THEN 'pendiente_pago'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'paid_pending_confirmation' THEN 'pagado_por_confirmar'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'in_kitchen' THEN 'preparacion'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'dispatched' THEN 'listo'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'delivered' THEN 'entregado'
    WHEN o.order_status = 'cancelled' THEN 'cancelado'
    ELSE 'por_confirmar'
  END AS status,

  COALESCE(o.confirmed_at, o.requested_at, o.created_at) AS "createdAt",
  COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at) AS "updatedAt",
  COALESCE(o.estimated_minutes_max, o.estimated_minutes_min, 45) AS "etaMin",

  COALESCE(c.full_name, '') AS "customerName",
  COALESCE(c.phone, '') AS phone,
  COALESCE(o.district, '') AS district,
  COALESCE(o.address_text, '') AS address,
  COALESCE(o.reference_text, '') AS reference,

  COALESCE(o.delivery_fee, 0)::float8 AS "deliveryFee",
  COALESCE(o.delivery_type, '') AS "deliveryType",
  COALESCE(o.subtotal, 0)::float8 AS subtotal,
  COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0)::float8 AS total,

  COALESCE(o.customer_notes, o.internal_notes, '') AS notes,

  -- Auditoria de delivery
  o.coverage_status AS "coverageStatus",
  o.delivery_confidence AS "deliveryConfidence",
  o.delivery_resolution_method AS "deliveryResolutionMethod",
  o.delivery_resolution_detail AS "deliveryResolutionDetail",

  CASE
    WHEN pr.id IS NOT NULL THEN true
    ELSE false
  END AS "hasReceipt",

  pr.id AS "paymentReceiptId",
  COALESCE(pr.storage_file_name, '') AS "receiptFileName",
  COALESCE(pr.storage_path, '') AS "receiptStoragePath",
  COALESCE(pr.storage_bucket, '') AS "receiptStorageBucket",

  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT json_agg(
        json_build_object(
          'id', oi.id,
          'item_name_snapshot', oi.item_name_snapshot,
          'quantity', COALESCE(oi.quantity, 0),
          'unit_price', COALESCE(oi.unit_price, 0)::float8,
          'line_subtotal', COALESCE(oi.line_subtotal, 0)::float8,
          'notes', oi.notes,
          'extra_items',
            COALESCE(
              (
                SELECT json_agg(
                  json_build_object(
                    'id', oie.id,
                    'extra_name', oie.extra_name,
                    'extra_unit_price', COALESCE(oie.extra_unit_price, 0)::float8,
                    'quantity', COALESCE(oie.quantity, 1),
                    'subtotal', COALESCE(oie.subtotal, 0)::float8
                  )
                  ORDER BY oie.created_at
                )
                FROM guaw.order_item_extras oie
                WHERE oie.order_item_id = oi.id
              ),
              '[]'::json
            )
        )
        ORDER BY oi.created_at
      )
      FROM guaw.order_items oi
      WHERE oi.order_id = o.id
    ),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS items

FROM guaw.orders o
LEFT JOIN guaw.customers c
  ON c.id = o.customer_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT r.id, r.storage_file_name, r.storage_path, r.storage_bucket
  FROM guaw.payment_receipts r
  WHERE r.order_id = o.id
  ORDER BY COALESCE(r.updated_at, r.created_at) DESC
  LIMIT 1
) pr ON true
WHERE o.id = '{{ $json.query.id }}'::uuid
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  el.id,
  el.created_at AS "createdAt",
  COALESCE(el.contact_name, '') AS "contactName",
  COALESCE(el.phone, '') AS phone,
  COALESCE(el.attendee_count, 0) AS "guestCount",
  el.event_date AS "eventDate",
  COALESCE(el.location_text, '') AS location,
  COALESCE(
    el.event_type,
    CASE
      WHEN el.needs_food_service IS TRUE THEN 'Servicio de comida'
      ELSE 'Evento'
    END
  ) AS "chaufaChoice",
  COALESCE(el.notes, '') AS notes,
  CASE
    WHEN el.status = 'new' THEN 'nuevo'
    WHEN el.status = 'qualified' THEN 'contactado'
    WHEN el.status = 'quoted' THEN 'cotizado'
    WHEN el.status IN ('won', 'lost', 'cancelled') THEN 'cerrado'
    ELSE 'nuevo'
  END AS status
FROM guaw.event_leads el
ORDER BY el.created_at DESC
LIMIT 100;

UPDATE guaw.event_leads
SET
  status = '{{ $json.dbStatus }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.leadId }}'
RETURNING id, status, updated_at;

SELECT
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM guaw.orders o
    WHERE o.order_status IN ('pending_confirmation', 'confirmed', 'in_kitchen', 'dispatched')
  ) AS "activeOrders",

  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM guaw.orders o
    WHERE o.order_status IN ('pending_confirmation', 'confirmed')
  ) AS "newOrders",

  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM guaw.orders o
    WHERE o.order_status = 'in_kitchen'
  ) AS "preparingOrders",

  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM guaw.orders o
    WHERE o.order_status = 'dispatched'
  ) AS "readyOrders",

  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM guaw.orders o
    WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
  ) AS "deliveredOrders",

  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM guaw.orders o
    WHERE o.order_status IN ('pending_confirmation', 'confirmed', 'in_kitchen', 'dispatched', 'delivered')
  ) AS "todayOrders",

  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT SUM(
        COALESCE(
          NULLIF(o.total_amount, 0),
          (
            COALESCE(
              (
                SELECT SUM(oi.line_subtotal)
                FROM guaw.order_items oi
                WHERE oi.order_id = o.id
              ),
              0
            ) + COALESCE(o.delivery_fee, 0)
          )
        )
      )
      FROM guaw.orders o
      WHERE o.order_status IN ('pending_confirmation', 'confirmed', 'in_kitchen', 'dispatched', 'delivered')
    ),
    0
  )::float8 AS "totalSalesAmount",

  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT AVG(
        COALESCE(
          NULLIF(o.total_amount, 0),
          (
            COALESCE(
              (
                SELECT SUM(oi.line_subtotal)
                FROM guaw.order_items oi
                WHERE oi.order_id = o.id
              ),
              0
            ) + COALESCE(o.delivery_fee, 0)
          )
        )
      )
      FROM guaw.orders o
      WHERE o.order_status IN ('pending_confirmation', 'confirmed', 'in_kitchen', 'dispatched', 'delivered')
    ),
    0
  )::float8 AS "avgTicket",

  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM guaw.event_leads el
  ) AS "eventLeads",

  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM guaw.event_leads el
    WHERE el.status IN ('new', 'qualified', 'quoted')
  ) AS "pendingEventLeads",

  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM guaw.event_leads el
    WHERE el.status = 'won'
  ) AS "closedEventLeads";

select
  pr.id,
  pr.order_id,
  pr.storage_bucket,
  pr.storage_path,
  pr.storage_file_name,
  pr.validation_decision,
  pr.manual_review_status,
  pr.created_at
from guaw.payment_receipts pr
where pr.order_id = '{{ $json.query.orderId }}'::uuid
  and pr.storage_bucket is not null
  and pr.storage_path is not null
order by pr.created_at desc
limit 1;

update guaw.payment_receipts
set
  manual_review_status = 'approved',
  validation_decision = 'approved',
  reviewed_at = now(),
  updated_at = now()
where id = '{{ $json.paymentReceiptId }}'::uuid
returning
  id,
  order_id,
  manual_review_status,
  validation_decision,
  reviewed_at;

update guaw.orders
set
  order_status = 'confirmed',
  payment_status = 'paid',
  payment_reviewed_at = now(),
  payment_review_notes = 'Pago confirmado manualmente desde dashboard',
  updated_at = now()
where id = '{{ $("Validate Input").first().json.orderId }}'::uuid
returning
  id,
  order_status,
  payment_status,
  payment_reviewed_at,
  updated_at;

update guaw.payment_receipts
set
  manual_review_status = 'rejected',
  validation_decision = 'rejected_manual',
  reviewed_at = now(),
  updated_at = now()
where id = '{{ $json.paymentReceiptId }}'::uuid
returning
  id,
  order_id,
  manual_review_status,
  validation_decision,
  reviewed_at;

update guaw.orders
set
  order_status = 'pending_payment',
  payment_status = 'pending',
  payment_reviewed_at = now(),
  payment_review_notes = 'Pago rechazado manualmente desde dashboard',
  updated_at = now()
where id = '{{ $("Validate Input1").first().json.orderId }}'::uuid
returning
  id,
  order_status,
  payment_status,
  payment_reviewed_at,
  updated_at;
